#12368 — first-run onboarding audit: opaque backdrop (shipped by #12364)

Before = pre-#12364 translucent scrim (launcher/home bleeds through). After = develop with #12364's opaque chat-first-run-backdrop full-screen start. This PR audits and verifies the merged result; it ships no code change. Authoritative post-merge capture with the unlocked composer: packages/ui/src/components/shell/__e2e__/output/57-state-onboarding-opaque-backdrop.png (on develop).

viewport--stateBEFORE (pre-#12364)AFTER (develop, #12364)
chat-shell-breakpoint--default
chat-shell-breakpoint--first-run-local
desktop-landscape--default
desktop-landscape--first-run-local
ipad-landscape--default
ipad-landscape--first-run-local
ipad-portrait--default
ipad-portrait--first-run-local
mobile-landscape--default
mobile-landscape--first-run-local
mobile-portrait--default
mobile-portrait--first-run-local
